scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @zara/core && npm run build:raw && npm run dev:raw
scripts.dev:raw: concurrently -k -n tsc,api -c cyan,blue "tsc -p tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "dotenv -e ../../.env.example -e ../../.env -- tsx watch dist-js/main.js"
scripts.start: npm run build --workspace @zara/core && npm run build:raw && npm run start:raw
